name: Pulse Bar S

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E1B582DA-5EB8-46D0-B926-DCE89AA43520

comment:
The PULSE BAR S Includes a library of customizable RGB and CW strobe effects along with variable dimming modes and curves for quick programming. 
Wrapped in a durable, fully IP65-rated housing, the PULSE BAR S is suitable for any environment, indoors or outdoors, and its marine grade coating adds additional protection for harsher environments- even coastal locations.

The PULSE BAR S Includes a library of customizable RGB and CW strobe effects along with variable dimming modes and curves for quick programming.
